three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: D1 structure HH+HL (BULLISH). Dealing range 28,596 (May 18) → 30,776 (Jun 2). Price at 29,500 (41.4% of range) = DISCOUNT zone. Monday Jun 8 closed bullish +73.4pts after sweeping no PDH/PDL. Sunday Jun 7 was strong +523.5pts recovery candle. D1 Fib 62% = 29,425 holding as support. No SMT divergence vs US500.
three_layer_analysis.l2_h4_context: H4 structure LH+LL (BEARISH) — corrective recovery from Jun 4 crash. H4 dealing range 30,776 → 28,747. Price at 29,648 is near H4 62% retracement (29,518) and INSIDE the massive Jun 4 crash Bearish FVG (29,470 — 30,009, 539pts). Critical H4 Bearish OB at 29,554 — 29,717 is the key resistance zone. Unmitigated Bullish FVG at 29,458 — 29,543 (Jun 8 21:00) provides near support. Bullish OB at 29,281 — 29,426 (Jun 8 17:00) is strong demand.
three_layer_analysis.l3_m15_entry: M15 structure HH+HL (BULLISH) — steady recovery. M15 swing highs: 29,444 → 29,458 → 29,523 → 29,607 → 29,666 (consecutive HH). M15 swing lows: 29,298 → 29,281 → 29,567 → 29,543 → 29,613 (consecutive HL). COMPRESSION detected (34.8 vs 50.6 avg range) — expansion imminent. No Kill Zone active at 06:30 NY. London KZ passed (02:00-05:00), NY AM KZ (08:30-11:00) is next catalyst window.

reasoning: D1 bullish structure intact with price in discount (41.4%) after the Jun 4 crash (-1,552pts). Recovery has been orderly: +523.5pts (Jun 7) then +73.4pts (Jun 8 Mon). Current price 29,648 is approaching the critical H4 Bearish OB at 29,554-29,717 AND the massive Jun 4 crash FVG (29,470-30,009). This confluence zone is the make-or-break level. M15 compression signals expansion is imminent — likely during NY AM Kill Zone (08:30-11:00 NY). Two scenarios: (1) Bullish — price breaks above 29,717, invalidates H4 bearish OB, targets 30,009 (FVG top) then 30,231 (D1 Fib 25%). (2) Bearish rejection — price rejected at 29,717 OB, pulls back to 29,425-29,543 (D1 62% + H4 Bullish FVG) for a second attempt. Bias is cautiously bullish given D1 structure and discount positioning, but H4 bearish OB overhead demands confirmation before aggressive longs. Wait for NY AM KZ for entry.
